lines.hearsay: There was talking out at {place}, which there mostly is not.
lines.gossip: {B} got three whole sentences out of {A} at {place} about the water sitting wrong this year — {B} is the only one who ever gets any, and has never once mentioned that to a living soul.
lines.report: {A} gave {B} an account of the fen's condition at {place}, slot {slot}.
